allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5050/api/services" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Body: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,300\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Frontend running: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Frontend not running or error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5050/api/services" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "Backend OK - $\($r.StatusCode\) - Items: $\(\($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).Count\)" } catch { Write-Host "Backend ERROR: $_" })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Frontend OK - $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Frontend ERROR: $_" })
